instance.gpu_note: T4 was unavailable across all us-central1 zones and all US regions at time of provisioning. L4 substituted — same generation data center GPU, higher peak throughput than T4.

model.name: resnet50
model.source: Exported locally via model/export_model.py, verified against committed sha256, copied to VM via gcloud scp

deviations_from_protocol: GPU: NVIDIA L4 used instead of T4 — T4 was exhausted across all us-central1 zones and all tested US regions (us-east1, us-west1) at time of provisioning.
Machine type: g2-standard-4 used instead of n1-standard-4 — required by L4 GPU.

Harness run location: harness executed on the VM itself (localhost:8000) rather than from a remote client, to work around org policy blocking VM external IPs. Network latency component is zero; all measured latency is pure inference + Triton overhead.
Model source: export script run locally (not pulled from GCS bucket) per team decision documented in cloudrun/CLAUDE.md.

concurrency_100.note: approximate from terminal output; authoritative values from CSV aggregation
